Class JoinCondition

java.lang.Object
iu.dao.JoinCondition
class JoinCondition extends Object
Represents a single SQL equality condition used to join a secondary table to the primary table in a JPA entity mapping.

Instances are created during EntityMetaData initialization and consumed by the SQL builder when constructing JOIN ... ON clauses. The condition always takes the form: 

primaryAlias.primaryColumn = secondaryAlias.secondaryColumn

  • Constructor Summary

    Description
    JoinCondition(String secondaryAlias, ColumnMetaData column)
    Creates a join condition where the primary and secondary tables share the same column name.

    Creates a join condition from an explicit PrimaryKeyJoinColumn annotation.

  • Constructor Details

    • JoinCondition

      JoinCondition(String secondaryAlias, ColumnMetaData column)
      Creates a join condition where the primary and secondary tables share the same column name.

      Used when a SecondaryTable declares no explicit PrimaryKeyJoinColumn entries; each @Id-mapped column of the entity becomes an implicit join column.

      Parameters:
      secondaryAlias - alias assigned to the secondary table
      column - @Id-mapped column from the primary table whose name is shared with the secondary table

    • JoinCondition

      JoinCondition(String secondaryAlias, jakarta.persistence.PrimaryKeyJoinColumn pkJoinColumn, EntityMetaData entity)
      Creates a join condition from an explicit PrimaryKeyJoinColumn annotation.

      The primary-side column is resolved in the following order:

      1. If PrimaryKeyJoinColumn.referencedColumnName() is non-blank, it is used as the primary column lookup key.
      2. Otherwise, if the entity has exactly one @Id column, that column's name is used.
      3. Otherwise, PrimaryKeyJoinColumn.name() is used as the fallback lookup key.

      If the resolved key matches a known column in the entity, that column's alias and name are used; otherwise the entity's primary-table alias and the raw lookup key are used directly.

      Parameters:
      secondaryAlias - alias assigned to the secondary table
      pkJoinColumn - annotation that describes the join column mapping
      entity - metadata for the owning entity, used to resolve column aliases and names

  • Method Details

    • appendTo

      void appendTo(StringBuilder sb)
      Appends the SQL equality condition to the given StringBuilder.

      Produces output of the form: primaryAlias.primaryColumn = secondaryAlias.secondaryColumn.

      Parameters:
      sb - target StringBuilder to append to
